pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Parallel Muon + Selective Pruning (val_bpb: 1.1171)

output.summary: Combines XSA on all 11 layers with Parallel Muon plus Hessian-aware GPTQ, selective ±1 pruning, and LZMA-compressed int6 weights.
techniques: Exclusive Self-Attention applied to every layer
Hessian-aware GPTQ with amax-aligned QAT and selective ±1 pruning
Parallel Muon optimizer with parameter banking and LZMA-compressed int6 weights
